title: Item Alchemy
description: Add an EMC system like Project E. It can equivalent exchange of items.
body:
Add EMC like ProjectE and transform items in "Alchemy Table".

In "Philosopher's Stone" you can exchange blocks equivalently.

 

This mod is under development.

I wanted a mod like Project E for Fabric, so I made one.

This mod is Inspired by Project E.

 

This mod has MCPitanLibarch as a dependency and MCPitanLibarch requires Architecture API.

It's currently Fabric only and requires the Fabric API.

![AlchemyTableGui](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/514/250/2022-11-10_23.png)
![AlchemyItem](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/521/825/2022-11-20_01.png)
# Items
- Philosopher's Stone...Equivalent exchange of blocks
- Alchemy Table...Convert items to EMC and EMC to items.
- Alchemy Pad...Handheld version of Alchemy Table
